CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the current number of Stage 3 pressure ulcers at discharge, that were not present or were at a lesser stage on admission.
399 M0800C_WRSNG_STG_4_ULCRS_NUM M0800C_WRSNG_STG_4_ULCRS_NUM M0800C Pressure Ulcers - Number of Worsening Stage 4 Pressure Ulcers Since Admission - The data in this column indicates the current number of Stage 4 pressure ulcers at discharge, that were not present or were at a lesser stage on admission.
